greeting: Hello! This is an automated call from Kunjilicious Technologies regarding your job application. I will ask you 5 quick questions. After each question, please speak your answer clearly. Let's begin.
closing: Thank you for answering all the questions. Our HR team at Kunjilicious Technologies will review your responses and get back to you soon. Have a great day. Goodbye!
questions: Which position are you applying for?
Are you currently available for an interview this week? Please say yes or no, and mention your preferred day if possible.
How many years of relevant work experience do you have?
What is your notice period, or how soon can you join if selected?
noInputMessage: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Let me repeat the question.
